title: Energizing Fluffy Mediterranean Lemongrass Wrap
description: A light, malty, and fluffy wrap combining steamed lemongrass-infused chickpea filling with fresh Mediterranean herbs, wrapped in warm spinach leaf wraps for a revitalizing sick‑day meal.
instructions: Blanch spinach leaves in boiling water for 30 seconds, then shock them in ice water and pat dry.
In a bowl, combine mashed chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, mint, lemongrass, cucumber, and tomato; mix until smooth.
Warm the blanched spinach leaves on a dry skillet for 10 seconds until pliable.
Spread a thin layer of the chickpea mixture onto each leaf, leaving a small border.
Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling and roll tightly to form a wrap.
Place the wrapped spinach in a steamer basket and steam for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Transfer to a plate and gently press to keep shape while steaming.
Serve warm with a drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of fresh herbs.
